textByHash.0b660575731522c8a2cf45d38adaf9f90b14e4e1: Hmmm... let me think. I don't think that's ever arisen but I think it's 20,000.
textByHash.0eb649bcaa0f931c7bf9a2c55d753a05e9f2fc8b: I was just getting to that. Both the challengers' cats are placed inside the arena, and whichever kills 9 rats first wins.
textByHash.2c8978892336b41478e9431a8d68ed1627891ba0: Of course there is, you can instruct it to be cautious, and it will leave once it feels as if it is in danger.
textByHash.2d854b415ec0710e1256d4dba3679e127098eaa5: No. Regular townsfolk don't like us, which leads us to distrust them and anyone else.
textByHash.34f5af20d9c4422ecf6314e92ae2f7620660137b: I'm the rat keeper, it's my job to look after these here rats.
textByHash.34fee72d4be80a69b3e1366ed9c9482840533599: It's a cruel world and the pits are no exception.
textByHash.40741783365ef16ceee4e53c4a410ba2302bacbf: Well if your cat dies or it runs away you lose.
textByHash.5e3df4eee02d304c80abf3ed22b8fe7cb6955ab7: You then agree on a wager. It's rumoured that some ratcatchers can talk to their own cats and give them tactics to aid them.
textByHash.6d16ff60a94433b34db2c967a3d31c28a57949b0: So the longer it stays in the fight the better chance you have of winning.
textByHash.7183242ec015610b2b285a2f675bdf147f0adab5: No, not now, we don't really bet with outsiders.
textByHash.728c5bf9fdf362df95efd56cf2e4a3943a7bb075: Some nibble their way out from time to time. Don't worry there's enough cats down here to sort anything that gets out.
textByHash.77133166d92ec51299ce0cad01024e008b3f02b3: That depends on how you value your cat.
textByHash.7eceedfd30ace1e7346a881420205f988f1ce1fd: You'd be surprised what some people would be willing to bet.
textByHash.8626d6200cf06fb8b19aa63b043075fcf4078a9e: If you have an overgrown cat and a couple of coins you can challenge someone else who also has an overgrown cat and some spare change.
textByHash.9906c409271f95803ebf937d5a0084b0119ef60f: The Keldagrim pits cater for those with the larger variety of cats.
textByHash.aad3b70c8a00a21fd8a4b0deb102017c2b15f4e5: There is a minimum bet of 100 coins too.
textByHash.e3bc75043589b15dffef58baa50080d205b80ceb: One thing I know though is that it's a quick way to make and lose money.
textByHash.ef9099777aab9548905978dcabab747c6bf0f1e6: I don't know, maybe once you've done something to win over my trust.
textByHash.f5524b693ea4fb4f4bdbefdecc0c3af01ea5e238: Each to their own, I say.
textByHash.f89efb1f3e1c7c306a98da45fa5367a675b22fa1: I agree. Cats have been known to be killed in fights.
